# source: live tmux capture of `agy` /usage (Antigravity CLI 1.0.10, 2026-06-23)
# NEW grouped "Models & Quota" layout: header is "Models & Quota" (not "Model
# Quota"), models are bucketed into groups (GEMINI MODELS / CLAUDE AND GPT
# MODELS) that share a single "Weekly Limit" bracketed bar `[██░░] 85.61%` plus
# a "NN% remaining · Refreshes in 157h 26m" / "Quota available" status line.
# Account email scrubbed -> example@website.com.

      ▄▀▀▄        Antigravity CLI 1.0.10
     ▀▀▀▀▀▀       example@website.com (Antigravity Starter Quota)
    ▀▀▀▀▀▀▀▀      Gemini 3.1 Pro (Low)
   ▄▀▀    ▀▀▄     ~/Documents/code/testingmurderharness
  ▄▀▀      ▀▀▄

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
>
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
└ Models & Quota

  Account: example@website.com

GEMINI MODELS
  Models within this group: Gemini Flash, Gemini Pro

  Weekly Limit
    [███████████████████████████████████████████░░░░░░░] 85.61%
    86% remaining · Refreshes in 157h 26m


CLAUDE AND GPT MODELS
  Models within this group: Claude Opus, Claude Sonnet, GPT-OSS

  Weekly Limit
    [██████████████████████████████████████████████████] 100.00%
    Quota available


  │Within each group, models share a weekly limit. Quota is consumed
  │proportionally to the cost of the tokens. Thus, limits will last longer with
  │shorter tasks or using more cost-effective models. Your weekly limit is tied
  │directly to your individual tier.

  ↑/↓ Scroll · pgup/pgdown Page · ctrl+end Bottom · ctrl+home Top · esc Close
esc to cancel                                                                                                                                                                       Gemini 3.1 Pro (Low)
